# Project Guidelines

## OpenSCAD Dimension Responses
- When answering questions about dimensions in .scad files, always provide resolved numeric values, not only variable names or symbolic expressions.
- Assume dimensions are in millimeters unless the model explicitly defines other units.
- If a value is derived, compute and show the final number directly in the response.
- For overall model size questions, report final width x height (and depth if applicable) using concrete numbers.

## Example Preference
- Preferred: "The model is 1500 x 1423 mm."
- Avoid: "The model is half_width * number_halves x one_bit + another_bit + third_bit."
